summary: Ran 25 pytest backend tests + Playwright UI smoke covering home/services, admin login+all 5 admin tabs, register+4 user dashboard tabs. All 25 backend tests PASS after fixing 3 MongoDB _id serialization bugs. Frontend loads correctly, admin/user role redirects work, all tabs navigate.

minor.issue: Endpoints returned raw insert doc including ObjectId _id causing 500 on JSON serialization. Fixed by adding doc.pop('_id', None) after insert.

issues: Two console 401 errors on initial load from /api/auth/me — expected while unauthenticated but noisy; consider swallowing 401 in axios interceptor.

action_items: (Optional) Suppress 401 console errors from unauthenticated /api/auth/me probe on public pages.
(Optional) Xendit/SendGrid/Twilio still MOCKED — user must supply keys to enable real invoices/reminders.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py — several create endpoints returned mutated insert doc containing bson ObjectId `_id` leading to 500. Fixed for plans/subscriptions/payments; audit any future create endpoints for the same pattern.
server.py send_reminder uses SendGrid/Twilio synchronously inside async handler — will block event loop if keys are added. Should wrap in run_in_executor or use async clients.

server.py — CORS uses allow_origins='*' with allow_credentials=True which browsers will reject with credentials. Not blocking current tests (JS uses Bearer + credentials include) but should be tightened to explicit origins.
test_credentials: admin@patungandigital.id / admin123 works. Register creates user with role=user.
seed_data_creation: Test suite creates TEST_ prefixed users, a netflix subscription, and a payment for the fresh test user. Not cleaned up between runs but each run uses timestamped emails.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py — run with `pytest -o addopts='' backend/tests/backend_test.py` (default addopts uses -n xdist which causes race conditions on unique-email fixtures). Consider updating pytest.ini or using pytest-xdist --dist=loadfile for these session-scoped fixtures.
rca of the issue: 500s on create plan/subscription/payment were caused by motor's insert_one mutating the input dict to include a bson ObjectId `_id`. FastAPI/JSON encoder cannot serialize ObjectId → 500. Fixed by popping `_id` before returning.
